fundamentals.name: ProShares Ultra VIX Short-Term Futures ETF
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: The index seeks to offer exposure to market volatility through publicly traded futures markets and is designed to measure the implied volatility of the S&P 500 over 30 days in the future.

news.paragraph: UVXY, a leveraged ETF designed to track volatility, is highlighted as one of ten leveraged ETFs built to lose value. This cautionary note suggests a bearish outlook for the instrument, implying that its structure and strategy are inherently prone to decay over time, especially in less volatile market conditions. Investors should be aware of the significant risks associated with holding such products long-term.

headlines.title: Stop Trading These 10 Leveraged ETFs Built to Lose

examples.body: $UVXY Stay away from this criminal exchange
$UVIX $UVXY If Iran or anyone dropped a Nuke, this will be at 30 in 3 trading days or less no reverse split, & 300 with a reverse split.
